packageRules.description: AltServer-Linux + netmuxd + AltStore are a tightly-coupled client/server stack with no published compatibility matrix. Group them into one reviewed PR and never auto-merge — the combo can only be verified with a real device + the CI smoke build.
Track AltStore Classic only (1.x). AltStore PAL (2.x) is the EU marketplace and does not use AltServer.
